visits.note: Patient presents with new onset of fatigue and increased thirst. Physical examination reveals a blood pressure of 140/90 and a BMI of 30. Labs: HbA1c 7.2, BP_systolic 140, BP_diastolic 90, eGFR 72, LDL 130. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia. Medications: Metformin 500mg BID, Lisinopril 10mg daily.

Patient reports worsening fatigue and increased blood pressure. Labs: HbA1c 8.1, BP_systolic 150, BP_diastolic 95, eGFR 68, LDL 140. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications: Metformin 500mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily.

Patient reports improved energy levels, but increased edema. Labs: HbA1c 7.5, BP_systolic 145, BP_diastolic 90, eGFR 60, LDL 120. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily, Furosemide 40mg daily.

Patient reports stable energy levels and decreased edema. Labs: HbA1c 7.8, BP_systolic 140, BP_diastolic 80, eGFR 55, LDL 110. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily, Furosemide 40mg daily, Eplerenone 50mg daily.
